description: MCP prompt map for the Visual Intelligence Archive. Each entry registers a prompt template agents can call.

prompts.name: interpret_image_888
prompts.description: Two-pass image interpretation following the Visual Intelligence framework. Pass 1: literal description. Pass 2: reflective interpretation with explicit witness context and uncertainty.

arguments.name: archive_context
arguments.description: Name or description of the archive or dataset this image comes from

arguments.name: prior_interpretations
arguments.description: Any prior interpretation records to reference

prompts.name: compare_images_888
prompts.description: Side-by-side comparison of two images with recurrence analysis. Identifies shared motifs, structural similarities, and divergences. Produces symbolic candidates only when recurrence holds across both.

arguments.name: archive_context
arguments.description: Archive or series context for both images

prompts.name: score_interpretation
prompts.description: Evaluate an interpretation record against the Visual Intelligence framework constraints. Returns a pass/fail assessment per constraint with specific citations.

arguments.name: interpretation_record
arguments.description: The interpretation record JSON to evaluate
